name_en: Ministry of Defense and Armed Forces Logistics
name_fa: وزارت دفاع و پشتیبانی نیروهای مسلح
description: Iran's Defense Ministry (Vezarat-e Defa va Poshtibani-ye Niruhaye Mosallah) manages defense procurement, arms production, and logistics for Iran's armed forces. It does not command operational forces; that function resides with the General Staff and IRGC command. Key ministers: [Ali Shamkhani](/people/ali-shamkhani) (1997–2005), [Mostafa Mohammad-Najjar](/people/mostafa-mohammad-najjar) (2005–2009), [Ahmad Vahidi](/people/ahmad-vahidi) (2009–2013), [Hossein Dehghan](/people/hossein-dehghan) (2013–2017), Amir Hatami (2017–2021), [Mohammad Reza Ashtiani](/people/mohammad-reza-ashtiani) (2021–2024), [Aziz Nasirzadeh](/people/aziz-nasirzadeh) (2024–present).
editorial_notes: Supreme Leader has direct approval over Defense Minister appointment. The ministry merged with the IRGC general staff in 1989 under Rafsanjani.
